subject: english
rawText:
=== 第1页 ===
2025级北大附中初一下 Unit 1 Grammar Focus
© 1. Grammar List
Why, What, Where questions Because ... Adjectives of quality Plurals
由 Why, What 和 Where 引导的特殊疑问句 Use Because 描述原因 表示性质和品质的形容词 名词复数的变化规则及使用
2. Grammar Review
① What's your favourite animals?
Is monkey.
Where are penguins from?
They are from Antarctica.
Why are you like penguins so much?
Because they are very lovely.
Why don't you like snakes?
Because they are really scary.
你最喜欢的动物是什么？
是猴子。
企鹅来自哪里？
它们来自南极洲。
你为什么喜欢企鹅？
因为它们非常可爱！
你为什么不喜欢蛇？
因为它们真的吓人。

=== 第2页 ===
These things are plural: scissors, glasses, trousers, jeans, shorts, tights, pyjamas. Do you wear glasses? Where are the scissors? I need them. You can also say a pair of scissors / a pair of trousers / a pair of pyjamas etc. I need a new pair of jeans or I need some new jeans (not a new jeans). Some plurals do not end in -s. this man → these men a woman → some women a child → many children also a person / some people / a lot of people etc.. She's a nice person. They are nice people (not nice persons) People is plural (= they), so we say people are / people have etc. A lot of people speak English (not speaks) The police want to talk to anybody who saw the accident. (not The police wants) Who invites Nina to the party? Where are you going every summer? Why are you don't like the film? 1. Lara invites Nina to the party. 2. We go to Italy every summer. 3. I don't like the film because the story is boring. Tick the correct question, or b. 1. a Where does he work? √ b Where he works? 2. a Why you are reading? √ b Why are you reading? 3. a What his name is? b What is his name? Complete the questions with the words from the box. a What can I do? b What can I do? a Where you live? √ b Where do you live? a When does the lesson begin? b When the lesson begins?

=== 第3页 ===
1. How old is your son? 2. Which boots are you going to buy? 3. Whose table is this? 4. Why are you opening the window? 5. What is he going to do? 6. When are we going home? 7. Where are you at the moment? 8. Who is that man next to your dad? a. Write the plural form of each noun. 1. man men 2. foot feet 3. woman women 4. child children 5. fish fish 6. mouse mice 7. sheep sheep 8. tooth teeth 9. people people 10. ox oxen e. Look at the pictures and complete the sentences. 1. There are a lot of sheep in the field. 2. Gary is cleaning his teeth. 3. There are three people at the bus stop. 4. Lucy has two children in the river. 5. There are a lot of fish in the river. 6. The leaves are falling from the tree. f. Use an adjective and a noun to complete each sentence. 1. Look at those black clouds. It's going to rain. 2. I would like to have a shower, but there's no hot water. 3. Can you open the window? We need some fresh air. 4. I need a sharp knife to cut these onions. 5. Do you speak any foreign languages?

=== 第4页 ===
Be careful what you say around your dog. It might understand more than you think.
A border collie (博德牧羊犬) named Rico understood the names of about 200 objects, said researchers in Germany. The dog also appears to be able to learn new words as easily as a 3-year-old child. Its word-learning skills are as good as those of a parrot.
In one experiment, the scientists asked Rico to go and get one of the objects and bring it back. In four tests, Rico got 37 out of 40 orders right. The owner then told Rico to get the correct object, using a word the dog had never heard before. The dog already knew the seven toys' names. So the scientists believe Rico must understand the meanings of certain words, clues, so the scientists believe Rico must understand the meanings of certain words.
In another experiment, the scientists trained the collie, this special dog is at good thinking abilities. Besides, scientists have trained the collie, this special dog is at good thinking abilities. Both experiments show that Rico is smart enough to get all orders right. Rico can remember different things including toys. Rico has had the ability of learning math by training. Rico learned things easily because of the owner's sweet-talk. Rico is thought to be smarter than the usual dog. For one thing, Rico is a border collie, this special dog is at good thinking abilities. Even if they do, they can't talk back. Still, it wouldn't hurt to sweet-talk your dog every now and then. You might just get a big, wet kiss in return.
( ) 1. From paragraph 2, we know that parrots have very good
A. memorizing skills
B. thinking abilities
C. word-learning skills
D. physical skills
( ) 2. Both experiments show that
A. Rico is smart enough to get all orders right.
B. Rico can remember different things including toys.
C. Rico has had the ability of learning math by training.
D. Rico learned things easily because of the owner's sweet-talk.
( ) 3. Scientists think Rico is smarter than the usual dog partly because of
A. its old age
B. its thinking ability
C. its owner's words
D. its various toys
( ) 4. What is the writer's main purpose in writing this passage?
A. To tell us dogs can understand people.
B. To introduce the ways of training dogs.
C. To show some dogs can talk to people.
D. To explain the different reasons to talk to dogs.

=== 第5页 ===
In recent years, the issue of animal protection has got widespread attention. Animals are our friends on this planet, and they play a vital role in maintaining ecological balance. However, many species are facing the threat of extinction (灭绝) due to human activities.
Deforestation is one of the main reasons for the decline in animal populations. When forests are cut down, animals lose their habitats. For example, the orangutan, a large ape native to the rainforests of Borneo and Sumatra, is struggling to survive. Their homes are being destroyed to make way for palm oil plantations. As a result, their numbers have decreased dramatically.
Pollution is also a significant threat to animals. Water pollution can harm aquatic life. Many fish and other marine creatures die because of polluted water. Air pollution affects birds and other animals that breathe the polluted air. For instance, smog in cities can cause health problems for animals, just as it does for humans.
Fortunately, more and more people are becoming aware of the importance of animal protection. Governments and organizations around the world are taking actions. Laws have been created to protect endangered species. For example, the giant panda in China is now under strict protection. Its habitat is being restored, and poaching is strictly prohibited.
Individuals can also contribute to animal protection. We can start by reducing our consumption (消费) of products that harm the environment. For example, choosing reusable bags instead of plastic bags can help reduce pollution, which is harmful to marine animals. We can also support animal protection organizations by donating money or volunteering our time.
In conclusion, animal protection is not just the responsibility of governments and organizations. It is something that each of us can and should participate in. By working together, we can create a better world for both humans and animals.

=== 第6页 ===
2025级北大附中初一下 Unit 1——Language in Use
一、单选
( ) 1. Don't forget ______ the lights before leaving the classroom.
A. turn off
B. turning off
C. to turn on
D. to turn off
( ) 2. It takes a long time for the trees to grow up, so don't ______.
A. cut them off
B. cut them up
C. cut them down
D. cut them away
( ) 3. ______ do you like tigers?
A. Why
B. How
C. What
D. Where
( ) 4. We are afraid of tigers because they're too ______.
A. beautiful
B. lovely
C. scary
D. dirty
( ) 5. My sister likes singing very much, and my mother likes singing ______.
A. also
B. too
C. either
D. as well as
( ) 6. My parents always let me ______ what I think is right.
A. to do
B. do
C. doing
D. does
( ) 7. People ______ Thailand celebrate Thai Elephant Day ______ 13 March.
A. on; in
B. in; on
C. in; in
D. at; of
( ) 8. We must save the forests and not buy things ______ ivory to protect elephants.
A. made into
B. made with
C. made up
D. made of
二、完成句子
1. 大象是泰国的象征之一。Elephants are ______ part of ______ culture.
2. 大象非常聪明。They can remember places ______ food and water.
3. 现在大象正处于危险之中，因为人们会为了象牙去杀害大象。
Now elephants are in ______ danger, because people kill elephants ______ their ivory.
4. 我们必须呼吁人们停止砍伐树木，停止购买象牙制品。
We must call ______ people to stop ______ trees, and stop buying things ______ ivory.
5. 在我看来，保护动物不因任何原因被杀害对我们来说是很重要的。
In my opinion, it's important for us to ______ the animals from being killed for any reasons.

Is monkey.

They are from Antarctica.

Why don't you like snakes?

These things are plural: scissors, glasses, trousers, jeans, shorts, tights, pyjamas. Do you wear glasses? Where are the scissors? I need them. You can also say a pair of scissors / a pair of trousers / a pair of pyjamas etc. I need a new pair of jeans or I need some new jeans (not a new jeans). Some plurals do not end in -s. this man → these men a woman → some women a child → many children also a person / some people / a lot of people etc.. She's a nice person. They are nice people (not nice persons) People is plural (= they), so we say people are / people have etc. A lot of people speak English (not speaks) The police want to talk to anybody who saw the accident. (not The police wants)

Who invites Nina to the party?
Where are you going every summer?
Why are you don't like the film?
options: a. Lara invites Nina to the party.
b. We go to Italy every summer.
c. I don't like the film because the story is boring.
